last_run_note: No trades; held all positions. 5th check-in today, ~18 min after last cycle; market closed, quotes unchanged, no fresh catalyst.

schedule_gaps.detail: Only the 15:00 CDT (20:00 UTC) cycle ran today; confirmed by git history (single 2026-07-22 commit) and single-entry data/history.json and data/research_log.json for that date. Checked the actual routine config directly (trig_01SXRXA4iA4wjwFAojHtnHEk, 'Paper Trading Simulator - Daily Cycle'): cron_expression is correctly '7 14,17,20 * * *' (UTC) and enabled=true, and it was updated to this 3-slot schedule at 2026-07-21T23:24:01Z — nearly 15 hours before the first missed slot today. So this was NOT a stale-config issue (ruling out the earlier hypothesis). last_fired_at shows only the 20:08:22Z firing; the routine API exposes no execution/run history beyond that single timestamp, so why the 14:07Z and 17:07Z firings didn't run or complete is unconfirmed from here. Check run history at https://claude.ai/code/routines/trig_01SXRXA4iA4wjwFAojHtnHEk for error details.
